summary: Codec runtime-dir resolution must survive missing `ASTRID_CODEC_RUNTIME_DIR` and unavailable `current_exe()` rather than silently losing projection persistence.
The fixed-seed codec projection matrix and epoch/checksum path should remain deterministic across calls and fresh runtime contexts.
The entropy smoothstep around `TAIL_VIBRANCY_ENTROPY_GATE=0.85` should avoid discontinuous vibrancy pops.
